Hey, what's going on everyone? Okay, so what I want to show you is kind of the tools you will need and the build out structure of this machine that we're going to be putting together to get people to give you their names so that we can get them in the door. Alright, so the first software you're going to need is Acuity and we do it in this order because that's actually the order that you will need to do it in terms of building it out. The first thing you'll do is grab the Acuity, the links for each of these are below. We've negotiated discounts on some of these softwares so just click the links. Yes, they are affiliate links but like I said, this is not how we make our living but a few of them we have actually been able to negotiate a lower rate for you guys so use them at your discretion. Anyways, so Acuity scheduling, what that is in the process is this puppy right here. So this is actually a plug-in that is going to be plugged into your thank you page on your website. This is Acuity and so that's the first software you're going to sign up for. The second software that you're going to sign up for is ClickFunnels which is what this is, it's a landing page software and we will be giving you several share funnels that basically fully built sequences of pages that all you need to do is just drag and drop your name, etc. inside of them. The actual page that you get may differ from this video and that is because we're constantly changing the landing pages to continually optimize them so that we have the best response but they may look and feel very different from this but the concept will be the same. It will be two capture leads. Mind you, this is also on ClickFunnels as well. So this is a plug-in and then the actual site itself is ClickFunnels. After that you'll have Google Sheets which you do not see because that's on the business side. That's where you're going to be capturing the leads so you'll see their names, phone numbers, etc. pop up and populate on that sheet so that you can begin working those leads. We put Twilio and Front App together, these two things. Twilio is a new phone number, I recommend getting one, they're like $3 a month, it's not expensive. With Twilio you will be able to have basically a marketing phone number so that you don't get people calling you at 2am from the internet. And then Front App is the easiest way to text correspondence with your leads because they will automatically populate with their names into Front App. So it's basically like a texting software so that you can see all of the leads that are coming in and you don't have to look at the phone number and then find the sheet, your Google Sheet, look up their name to figure out who it is, it'll just say Sarah Evans and then you'll just say hey Sarah blah blah blah. What makes this whole machine work is Zapier. Zapier is kind of a software glue. It's basically a bridge between all of these things so there's going to be Zapiers that connect ClickFunnels to Google Sheets, Zapiers that connect Google Sheets to Front App basically just so that you wouldn't have to have a full time person copying and pasting things for living. Mind you, one question we always get is like well how much is all this going to cost? I think it's a couple hundred bucks a month but if you think about how much it's saving you in man hours, it's saving you thirty grand a year and would you have to pay someone to do all this stuff? Right? Not including how much you'd have to pay to build a website and have someone maintain it and all this stuff is now going to be skills that you will have and no longer be dependent on anyone else for. So these are the new softwares that you will use and then we will get into actually building them out.
